metadata.title: EM Consulting — College Admissions Strategy
metadata.description: Wharton Huntsman Dual Degree and MIT admit. Structured admissions consulting for Chinese families targeting U.S. top universities.

hero.title: Your child deserves a real plan
hero.subtitle: Wharton Huntsman Dual Degree & MIT admit. Positioning through submission, end to end.
hero.ctaSubtext: A 90-minute session to assess competitiveness and map your strategic direction

items.title: MIT + Wharton, same cycle
items.description: Not former admissions officers guessing from the outside. Applicants who navigated the system this year. We know the current standards because we just met them.

items.title: Five milestones, real deliverables
items.description: Defined documents and conclusions at every stage, with deadlines and acceptance criteria. Not open-ended coaching — a trackable strategy engagement.

items.title: Selective enrollment
items.description: We decline students we cannot meaningfully help. We only take cases where we have confidence in the outcome — that selectivity is part of the service.

items.title: Native bilingual communication
items.description: Mandarin-first with parents, English-first with students. No translation layer, no cultural gap.

milestones.title: Strategic Positioning
milestones.deliverable: Deliverable: Positioning deck with core narrative direction, initial school list (8–12), and essay topic map

milestones.title: Profile Optimization
milestones.deliverable: Deliverable: Profile roadmap covering activity adjustments, recommendation strategy, and test timeline

milestones.title: Essay Development
milestones.deliverable: Deliverable: Finalized essays, 3–4 feedback rounds each. All content written by the student

milestones.title: Application Review
milestones.deliverable: Deliverable: Submission checklist with full materials review, mock interviews, and parent sign-off

milestones.title: Post-Submission
milestones.deliverable: Deliverable: Decision analysis framework covering waitlist strategy and multi-offer comparison

team.title: Team
team.together: We conduct all initial consultations together.

eric.name: Eric Li
credentials: Huntsman Program (Wharton + College of Arts & Sciences)

mary.name: Mary Liu
credentials: Admitted to MIT (EA, Astrophysics) and Wharton (ED), same cycle

trackRecord.title: Where our students were admitted
trackRecord.subtitle: Select admissions from Eric's personal counseling and advisory experience.

testimonial.quote: Eric helped me through the entire process — narrowing my school list, sharpening my extracurriculars, and figuring out my personal statement. I was stuck on what story to tell, and he gave me a framework that made it click. He also reviewed all my supplementals and helped me apply to scholarships I wouldn't have found on my own. It made the whole thing a lot less stressful.

steps.title: Free Diagnostic Session
steps.description: Book a 90-minute call. We assess the student's academic profile, activities, and target schools, and give an initial competitiveness read.

steps.title: Sign-on & Strategy Report
steps.description: After signing, we deliver a full Admissions Strategy Report within five business days — covering positioning analysis, school list assessment, and next steps.

steps.title: End-to-End Execution
steps.description: From positioning through submission, five milestones of one-on-one guidance. Clear direction and tangible deliverables at every stage.

pricing.title: Transparent pricing
pricing.note: Every engagement starts with a free diagnostic session. After confirming fit, pricing is based on school count and service depth.

audit.name: Admissions Diagnostic Report
audit.description: Standalone deliverable. After a 90-minute session, a written assessment of positioning, competitiveness, and recommended strategy. No obligation.

full.name: Full Package
full.description: Five-milestone engagement covering 8–12 schools. All deliverables included, with biweekly check-ins and regular parent updates.

contact.title: Next step
contact.ctaDescription: A 90-minute session to assess competitiveness and map your strategic direction. Completely free, no obligation.
